title: Korak 20

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
def verify_card_number(card_number):
    sum_of_odd_digits = 0
    card_number_reversed = card_number[::-1]
    odd_digits = card_number_reversed[::2]

    for digit in odd_digits:
        print(digit)
        
def main():
    card_number = '4111-1111-4555-1142'
    card_translation = str.maketrans({'-': '', ' ': ''})
    translated_card_number = card_number.translate(card_translation)

    verify_card_number(translated_card_number)

main()
challengeFiles.seed:
def verify_card_number(card_number):
    sum_of_odd_digits = 0
    card_number_reversed = card_number[::-1]
    odd_digits = card_number_reversed[::2]

    for digit in odd_digits:
        print(digit)
        
def main():
    card_number = '4111-1111-4555-1142'
    card_translation = str.maketrans({'-': '', ' ': ''})
    translated_card_number = card_number.translate(card_translation)

    verify_card_number(translated_card_number)

main()

tests.text: Trebalo bi da imaš sum_of_odd_digits += digit unutar ciklusa for.

description:
Unutar ciklusa for, koristi operator += da doda digit na promenu sum_of_odd_digits.

Kada uradiš ovo, tvoj skript će nam dati TypeError jer pokušavaš dodati niz slova na ceo broj, ali ne brini, naučićeš više kako da ga učiniš funkcionalnim u sledećem koraku.
